title: Caching: CacheLookup table + SysGlobalObjectCache accessor
instruction: In the sandbox model, demonstrate record and global caching. Create: (1) a table DemoSetting with CacheLookup=Found, a unique index on field SettingKey (str) and a field SettingValue (str); (2) a class DemoSettingCache with a static method value(str _key) that first consults SysGlobalObjectCache (owner/key/scope) for the value, and on a miss selects DemoSetting by SettingKey, stores the result in the global cache, and returns it. Use get_knowledge(topic="caching") to ground the CacheLookup Found/FoundAndEmpty semantics and the SysGlobalObjectCache key/scope pattern. Both objects must build clean.
